title: PBR & Tweaks
description: Tweaks some textures and adds PBR
body:
----------------------------------------------
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6KUZGN8U/images/396350f71f0386414f303c635a24095724493bb0_350.webp)
----------------------------------------------
Issue: I use arch (btw) and GIMP (The thing I use to edit textures) crashes whenever I open the file popup, so I can't continue this until it's fixed or I suffer with windows. (I'll remove this when it works) Random info: All listed ore variants will be using the correct background (stone, deepslate) I will soon add stuff from 3D stuff as an option in versions using PBR
----------------------------------------------
PBR blocks:
List - All variants of sandstone - All variants of red sandstone - All chiseled blocks - Dirt & dirt paths - Honeycomb - Cobblestone & mossy cobblestone - Stone - Stone Bricks - Ancient debris - Redstone block - Beehive - Dispenser - Furnace - Dropper - Jukebox & noteblock - All variants of copper bulbs - TNT - Observer - Bee nest - Target - Crimson & warped stem (+ stripped) - All variants of bamboo planks & bamboo - Grass - Podzol - Mycelium - Coarse dirt - Rooted dirt - Crimson & warped nylium - Packed mud - Mud bricks - Mud - Muddy mangrove roots - Shroomlight - Warped & crimson wart blocks - Soul soil & sand - Bone block - Deepslate - All variants of planks - Bamboo fence - Sticky piston - Composter - Redstone lamp - Piston - Coal ore - Iron ore - Copper ore - Heavy core - Bamboo fence gate - Cobbled deepslate - Polished deepslate - Deepslate bricks - Cracked deepslate bricks - Cracked deepslate tiles - Deepslate tiles - Reinforced deepslate - Sculk - Sculk catalyst - Endstone (May be changed) - Sculk sensor (Both variants) - Sculk shrieker - Sculk vein - Pumpkin (all variants) - Magma block - Sea lantern - Lodestone - Loom - Blast furnace - Smooth stone & Smooth stone slab - Daylight detector - All log variants (1.21.1) - Calcite - Blackstone - Basalt - Smooth basalt - Polished basalt - Diamond block - Emerald block - Gold block
All listed ore variants will be using the correct background (stone, deepslate)
----------------------------------------------
Texture changes:
List - Cobblestone & mossy cobblestone - More accurate - Stone - Slate - Chiseled deepslate - More like the stone version - Dirt & dirt path - less noise - Dispenser - Use coblestone texture - Furnace - Use coblestone texture - Dropper - Use coblestone texture - Grass block - less noise (dirt) - Podzol - less noise (dirt) - Coarse dirt - less noise (dirt) - Rooted dirt - less noise (dirt) - Packed mud - Based on cobblestone - Warped & crimson wart blocks - Less noise - Coal ore - Iron ore - Copper ore - Dried kelp block
----------------------------------------------
